description: The Milenio Cartel was a Mexican criminal organization based in Michoacán and later Jalisco, founded by the Valencia family in the late 1970s. It engaged in drug trafficking, money laundering, murder, and arms trafficking, producing marijuana and heroin. The cartel was a branch of the Sinaloa Federation until its leadership was captured in 2009-2010, leading to its dissolution and the emergence of the Jalisco New Generation Cartel.

country_links.evidence_quote: By the mid 1990s they had close connections with Colombian traffickers like Fabio Ochoa Vásquez of the Medellín Cartel
country_links.context: The Milenio Cartel had close connections with Colombian traffickers, indicating a supply or partnership link.

country_links.evidence_quote: United States : California , Oregon , Texas , Illinois , North Carolina , Maryland
country_links.context: The Milenio Cartel has territory in multiple U.S. states, indicating its presence and operations there.
